creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 158830
move USE_MATE to conditional block

Hello,

Thanks for considering a lite version of atril, it really matters. One last thing: the mate-desktop dependency is non-conditional, which is what this port was trying to avoid :)

Moving the USE_MATE statement to a proper conditional block in graphic/atril fixes that (path attached), I have seen no problem building/running atril-lite after that.

Thanks,
